Study Hub
AI-Powered Study Platform

Study smarter,
together.

The all-in-one platform where students collaborate, share course materials, and get AI-powered study help. Chat, call, upload, and learn — all in one place.

100%
Free to use
24/7
AI assistance
∞
Study materials
🔒
End-to-end secure
Features

Everything you need to ace your courses

Built by students, for students. Every feature is designed to make studying more efficient and collaborative.

Real-time Chat

Group channels, direct messages, reactions, replies, and typing indicators — all in real time.

Course Library

Upload, organize, and share study materials by course. PDF, Word, and text extraction built in.

AI Assistant

Get instant explanations, document summaries, auto-generated quizzes, and smart searches across your materials.

Voice & Video

Start voice or video calls for live study sessions with your group — no extra apps needed.

Study Groups

Create or join study groups, manage members, and keep everything organized by subject.

Smart Moderation

Admin tools, role-based access, and content management to keep your community focused.

How it works

Up and running in 3 steps

1

Sign up for free

Create your account with email or Google — takes 30 seconds.

2

Join or create a group

Find your course channels or start your own study group.

3

Start collaborating

Chat, share files, quiz yourself with AI, and call your study partners.

Ready to transform how you study?

Join thousands of students using Study Hub to collaborate and succeed.
